holdings.infoBox: POWR is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are Quanta Services stock at 7.21%, GE Vernova at 7.08%, Eaton Corporation at 6.59%, NextEra Energy at 5.36%, and EQT Corporation at 4.11%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Power Infrastructure ETF (POWR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies involved in US power infrastructure. POWR was launched on Jan 31, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P U.S. Power Infrastructure Select Index
